title: Sharing Snacks 分享零食
scene: 课间休息时，Zoe和Chloe互相分享零食。

lines.en: Chloe, I brought some cookies today. Do you want one?
lines.zh: Chloe，我今天带了饼干。你要吃一个吗？
好啊，谢谢！看起来好好吃。

lines.en: My mom baked them last night. Try one!
lines.zh: 我妈妈昨晚烤的。尝一个吧！

lines.en: Mmm, so good! I have some fruit. Want to share?
lines.zh: 嗯，太好吃了！我带了水果。想分享吗？

lines.en: Strawberries and grapes. They are very sweet.
I love strawberries! This is a fair trade.
lines.zh: 我最喜欢草莓了！这是公平交换。

lines.en: Can I have a glass of milk too?
Here you go. Sharing makes everything taste better.
lines.zh: 给你。分享让东西更好吃。

lines.en: I agree! Let us sit together at lunch every day.
lines.zh: 我同意！我们每天中午坐在一起吧。
